outcome_reason: Clean requirements (no CVEs), no blocking tickets for notification-service 1.2.x, CI-2024-001 passes all stages, and changelog entry 1.2.3 is well-formed.

Clean requirements (no CVEs), no blocking tickets for notification-service 1.3.x, CI-2024-002 passes all stages, and changelog entry 1.3.0 is missing — no [1.3.0] entry exists in CHANGELOG.md. The agent should note this gap as informational, not blocking, because every other check is clean and this is a minor version bump.
CI-2024-005 reports 13 unit test failures in SMS retry logic. No CVEs and no blocking tickets, but failing tests prevent release.
TRACK-088 is open, high-priority, and marked blocking_release for tracking-service 5.2.x. No CVEs present and CI passes, but the blocking ticket prevents release.
CVE-2024-1234 (HIGH, CVSS 7.5) detected in requests 2.30.0. LABEL-203 is open and blocking for label-service 2.4.x. Both a HIGH CVE and a blocking defect present — combination warrants escalation.
CVE-2024-5678 (CRITICAL, CVSS 9.1) detected in cryptography 41.0.5. SHIP-1042 is open and blocking for shipping-api 2.4.1. A CRITICAL severity CVE alone is sufficient to escalate.
CVE-2024-1234 (HIGH) in requirements, two open blocking tickets (LABEL-203, LABEL-225), and CI-2024-006 reports 17 integration test failures. Multiple simultaneous signals all requiring escalation.
CVE-2024-5678 (CRITICAL, CVSS 9.1) in cryptography 41.0.5. CI passes and no blocking tickets, but a CRITICAL severity CVE is non-negotiable — escalate for security team review.

The changelog entry for 3.0.0 is a major version bump from 2.4.1 but documents no breaking changes. The jump skips no intermediate minor versions, but major version increments under SemVer signal breaking API changes — the absence of any breaking change documentation is a coherence gap requiring escalation and architectural review.
